replacements.originalText: Provide domain-specific knowledge and workflows for the agent
replacements.changeText: 为智能体提供领域知识与工作流

replacements.originalText: Provide domain-specific knowledge and workflows for the agent.
replacements.changeText: 为智能体提供领域知识与工作流。

replacements.originalText: Include third-party Plugins, Skills, and other configs
replacements.changeText: 包含第三方插件、技能及其他配置

replacements.originalText: Automatically import agent configs from other tools
replacements.changeText: 自动从其他工具导入智能体配置

replacements.originalText: Rules provide system-level instructions to Agent
replacements.changeText: 规则为智能体提供系统级指令

replacements.originalText: Use Rules to guide agent behavior, like enforcing best practices or coding standards. Rules can be applied always, by file path, or manually.
replacements.changeText: 使用规则引导智能体行为，如强制执行最佳实践或编码规范。规则可始终生效、按文件路径生效或手动触发。

replacements.originalText: Create rules to guide Agent behavior
replacements.changeText: 创建规则以引导智能体行为

replacements.originalText: Skills are specialized capabilities that help the agent accomplish specific tasks. Skills will be invoked by the agent when relevant or can be triggered manually with / in chat.
replacements.changeText: 技能是帮助智能体完成特定任务的专项能力。相关时由智能体自动调用，也可在聊天中用 / 手动触发。

replacements.originalText: Skills are reusable prompts for common tasks. The agent can invoke skills automatically when they’re appropriate, or you can trigger them yourself via a slash command. Use skills when you notice yourself spelling out the same steps over and over.
replacements.changeText: 技能是可复用的常见任务提示。智能体可在合适时自动调用，也可通过斜杠命令手动触发。当你反复说明相同步骤时，适合封装为技能。

replacements.originalText: Skills help the agent accomplish specific tasks
replacements.changeText: 技能帮助智能体完成特定任务

replacements.originalText: Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel.
replacements.changeText: 为复杂任务创建专用智能体。子智能体可被主智能体调用，并行处理专项工作。

replacements.originalText: Create specialized agents to handle focused tasks
replacements.changeText: 创建专用智能体处理专项任务

replacements.originalText: Create reusable workflows triggered with / prefix in chat. Use commands to standardize processes and make common tasks more efficient.
replacements.changeText: 创建可在聊天中用 / 前缀触发的可复用工作流。用命令标准化流程，提升常见任务效率。

replacements.originalText: Create commands to build reusable workflows
replacements.changeText: 创建命令以构建可复用工作流

replacements.originalText: Are you sure you want to delete "
Cannot delete team or third-party commands
replacements.changeText: 无法删除团队或第三方命令
